stemHtml: A powerful wartime piston single-engine aircraft equipped with a clockwise rotating propeller performs a go-around. If the throttle is increased to full power, what would be the most noticeable effect?

options.a: Roll to the right due to gyroscopic effect.
options.b: Yaw to the right due to gyroscopic effect.
options.c: Roll to the left due to gyroscopic effect.
options.d: Roll to the left due to torque effect which the pilot counters by using the ailerons.
